text: Fiona Stanley Hospital 11 Robin Warren Drive, Murdoch WA 6150 Phone Helpdesk: (08) 6152 2222 Email: FSH.Staffhealth@health.wa.gov.au www.fsh.health.wa.gov.au Dear Staff Member Thank you for completing your blood test (QuantiFERON-TB Gold) at the Fiona Stanley Hospital (FSH) PathWest laboratory. Your blood test has returned a negative serology result indicating that no tuberculosis specific antigens were detected and no further follow-up is required. This concludes the screening process requirements, according to the WA Tuberculosis Control Program Policy 6.1 Contact Tracing for Tuberculosis. We appreciate your patience and understanding throughout the investigation period. For more information, please contact the WA Tuberculosis Control Program on (08) 9222 8500 in the first instance, or the FSH Staff Health Department on telephone (08) 6167 2985 between 8am and 4pm, Monday to Friday. Kind regards Fiona Stanley Hospital Staff Health Department
